memberdef.argsstring: (XDpTxSs *InstancePtr, u8 Edid_org[128], u8 Edid1_org[128], u16 res_update)
memberdef.name: hpd_con

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a Hot-Plug-Detect (HPD) event is received by the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpTxSs_SetCallback driver function to set this function as the handler for HPD event.

briefdescription.para: This function is the main hpd pulse process.
This function to get uart input from user.
This function to send Audio Information Frame.
This function starts audio pattern generator.
This function stops audio pattern generator.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.
XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function sets VPHY based on the linerate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns current line rate.
This function returns current lane counts.
This function power cycle the sink.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: i2c_write_dp141

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, int FIn, int FOut, u8 FreeRun)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_SetClock

briefdescription.para: This function calculates and sets the IDT 8TN49N24x device with the given clock configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

specifies if the operation mode is locked/synthesizer mode.
TRUE Synthesizer mode (Fout only)
FALSE Locked mode (Fout locked to Fin)

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE I2C write error or incorrect parameters detected.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the IDT 8TN49N24x with default values for use with the Video FMC.

detaileddescription.para: This function set the GPIO outputs.

I2CBaseAddress
is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
I2CSlaveAddress
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
XST_SUCCESS Initialization was successful.
XST_FAILURE I2C write error.
None.
I2CBaseAddress
is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
I2CSlaveAddress
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
XST_SUCCESS
XST_FAILURE
None. This function set the input reference

I2CBaseAddress
is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
I2CSlaveAddress
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
XST_SUCCESS
XST_FAILURE
None. This function set the output drivers

I2CBaseAddress
is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
I2CSlaveAddress
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
XST_SUCCESS
XST_FAILURE
None. This function sets the lock mode

I2CBaseAddress
is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
I2CSlaveAddress
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
XST_SUCCESS
XST_FAILURE
None. This function initializes the IDT 8TN49N24x with default values for use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function puts the TI LMK03318 into sleep.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
